recommendations.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
recommendations.overview: The crew of an atomic submarine battle to save the world from global destruction.

recommendations.title: The Lost World
recommendations.overview: Professor Challenger leads an expedition of scientists and adventurers to a remote plateau deep in the Amazonian jungle to verify his claim that dinosaurs still live there.

recommendations.title: Beyond the Poseidon Adventure
recommendations.overview: After "The Poseidon Adventure", in which the ship got flipped over by a tidal wave, the ship drifts bottom-up in the sea. While the passengers are still on board waiting to be rescued, two rivaling salvage parties enter the ship on search for money,

recommendations.title: The Invisible Man
recommendations.overview: After experimenting on himself and becoming invisible, scientist Jack Griffin, now aggressive due to the drug's effects, seeks a way to reverse the experiment at any cost.

recommendations.title: Mute Witness
recommendations.overview: When a mute makeup/special effects artist working on a low-budget slasher film gets locked in a dilapidated Moscow movie studio late one night, she thinks she witnesses the making of a snuff film. Thus begins a night of terror.

recommendations.title: Frankenstein Unbound
recommendations.overview: The ultimate weapon, claimed to be safe for mankind, produces global side-effects including time slides and disappearances. The scientist behind the project and his car are zapped from the year 2031 to 1817 in Switzerland where he meets Dr. Victor Fr

recommendations.title: Bride of Frankenstein
recommendations.overview: Dr. Frankenstein and his monster both turn out to be alive after being attacked by an angry mob. The now-chastened scientist attempts to escape his past, but a former mentor forces him to assist with the creation of a new creature.

recommendations.title: Road Train
recommendations.overview: A supernatural thriller about a group of teenagers menaced by a driver-less train in the Australian outback.

recommendations.title: War of the Worlds: The Attack
recommendations.overview: Three young astronomers fight to survive a deadly Martian invasion.

recommendations.title: COVID-21: Lethal Virus
recommendations.overview: The climate change has released an ancient rabies virus trapped in the Antarctica ice. A female scientist tries to get to the laboratory to create a cure to save the world, protected by an eccentric and two members of the special forces.
